name: podcast-media-pipeline
description: A gated Codex workflow for producing podcast audio, episode cover art, videos, clips, and a scheduled release.

interface.shortDescription: Produce podcasts and videos with approval gates.
interface.longDescription: Guide a podcast episode from source review through audio and episode-cover production, mandatory listening and visual approval, long-form and short-form video creation, media QA, upload preview, and scheduled publishing.
defaultPrompt: Prepare my podcast audio and episode cover, then stop for both approvals.
Turn my approved podcast into a long video and short clips.
Preview upload metadata and schedule before publishing anything.
